title: SpawnAuth
description: Protect your Minecraft server from login location for AuthMe
body:
**AuthMeReloaded Required for Installation!**

🚀How to change spawn coordinates?

Simply enter the command /gamerule spawnradius with the desired radius specified. For example, /gamerule spawnradius 1000, and now when players enter, they will spawn around coordinates 1000 in the "World" dimension.
